arts.ttl: Goal-scoring wing-back becomes top Man Utd transfer target but Chelsea also keen on £30m man
arts.sum: Manchester United’s new manager Ruben Amorim is known for his 3-4-3 formation that makes use of wing-backs, so it’s not too surprising to see the club now shopping for that kind of player. arts.ttl: Further than New York! | Why Chelsea face a mammoth trip to Kazakhstan
arts.sum: Chelsea face a 7,000-mile round trip to Kazakhstan to face Astana - a flight time of around eight hours and temperatures of minus 13. Incredibly, New York is 18 miles closer to London than the Almaty Stadium, which is in south-eastern Kazakhstan.

arts.ttl: Chelsea full squad revealed for FC Astana as Christopher Nkunku and Noni Madueke decisions made
arts.sum: Filip Jorgensen, Axel Disasi, Tosin Adarabioyo and Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall are among the first-teamers also making the long trip. In his pre-match press conference, Enzo Maresca claimed he did not want to use any players that feature in Astana on Thursday night again on Sunday when they host Brentford in the Premier League, but admitted that could be a possibility.

arts.ttl: The 13 minutes that proved Cole Palmer is more than a goalscorer - even if Chelsea already knew it
arts.sum: It’s been a superb year for Cole Palmer at Chelsea, but it was a brief moment for England last summer that summed up his astonishing rise. Has he done enough to be your Fans' Footballer of the Year 2024?
